claim_boundaries: Paper-gate evidence supports bounded TextGrad calibration diagnostics only within the recorded Swissmetro semi-synthetic setup; negative or rejected candidate updates must not be presented as calibration effectiveness.
Observed rejected candidate updates require acceptance-gated prompt updates; raw TextGrad updates are not stable enough for an unqualified effectiveness claim.
Some legacy runs contain pending candidate updates from the old loop semantics; they are retained as historical evidence and must be labeled separately.
